dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires computing shadow height as percentage of breakout price and comparing to median. Since exact median values were not provided (AUTHOR_SILENT), translated as: tall shadows indicated by upper_wick or lower_wick exceeding ATR_14 (a volatility proxy), combined with above-average volume (hvol_20). Exit when volume falls below average, indicating breakout momentum loss. Direction is context-dependent per original signal (both bull and bear patterns). Used bar properties (upper_wick, lower_wick) to approximate shadow height calculations.

source_rule_text: Candle shadow height and volume characteristics for breakout trading: Tall shadows and heavy breakout volume improve performance
